title: V3DfgDfgToAst should have removed undriven sources on v5 master

features.name: 2D unpacked array with parameter-driven sizing
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked wire array where both dimensions use localparam computed from a module parameter

features.name: nested for-generate loops with genvar
features.description: Code should include nested for-generate loops using genvar iterators, where outer loop bounds depend on localparam

features.name: conditional generate inside for-generate
features.description: Code should include an if-generate statement nested inside a for-generate loop with genvar

features.name: undriven elements in unpacked array with generate
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array where some elements remain undriven due to generate loop bounds

features.name: bit slicing with dynamic slice width
features.description: Code should include variable slice width assignment using +: syntax where width is a localparam
